name: 史莱姆冒险战SlimeWarfare
short_description: "Slime Warfare" is a rogue tower defense game with a variety of gameplay and placement.Slimes are weak monsters and always bullied by humans. Players will play the role of the Slime Queen to build structures to defend against adventurers' attacks and strengthen themselves.
detailed_description:
"Slime warfare" is a roguelike, strategy and tower defense game. A special tower defense game where you can freely build roads and rich buff towers. Players take on the role of Queen Slime against invading adventurers.
This is a non-traditional tower defense game. You need to cleverly arrange the enemy's attack path and the position of the tower. The numerical advantage formed by the buff tower can allow you to win the game without external reinforcement.

Slimes and Adventurers



Legend has it that slimes are very weak creatures. This is a struggle between slimes and adventurers. Eliminate the invading adventurers to defend slimes! Save the slime queen, unlock characters and portraits. Each character has different values ​​and mechanisms.


Core Selection



Each battle has? ? Core selection. Each core will change your game mode.

BUFF Tower

Buff tower is the highlight of this game. You can use BUFF tower to strengthen your queen or attack tower to achieve the game clearance. You can also use traditional tower defense layout without using buff tower.


planning


Unlike previous tower defenses, the attack towers here have HP. So plan the layout and defend. The same type of tower, placed in different positions will even determine your success or failure.


free road



In the game you can pave your own path. According to the progression of each game time, you can get the number of road grids you can lay. During the game, you can change the layout of the road at will to assist your strategy.


random and decision


Choose the tower you need from randomly drawn towers. You can choose attack towers to increase your attack units, or you can choose buff towers to strengthen your attack units.

Enhanced upgrade



If you can't beat it, you can choose to upgrade your attack tower and queen in the main interface to protect every dungeon.
(If you like challenges, you can pass the level without upgrading off-site.)
